scope: v1 contract consumer readiness handoff endpoint adjacency
summary: v235 verifies the readiness handoff remains directly after the evidence digest in v1 pairs and directly before the read-only catalog group in the rolling evidence registry.
guards: readiness handoff live pair is adjacent after evidence digest live pair
readiness handoff fixture pair is adjacent after evidence digest fixture pair
endpoint catalog, consumer bundle, checklist, digest, handoff, and read-only catalog remain in sequence
readiness handoff remains the last v1 contract pair before the read-only group
endpoint and fixture inventories preserve the same adjacency
